title: Protein Expression and Extraction from Escherichia coli Periplasmic Space
author: Cristina Hernandez Rollan
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bdr2i58e

steps.title: Pick a fresh colony of your...
steps.instruction: Pick a fresh colony of your BL21 (DE3) strain with your expression vector, and inoculate it in LB supplemented with relevant antibiotics. Grow the culture at 37 °C at 250 RPM shaking Overnight . The volume of the overnight culture depends on the volume of the expression culture and should be at least 1/100 of the expression culture

steps.title: Dilute the overnight culture 1:100 in...
steps.instruction: Dilute the overnight culture 1:100 in fresh LB supplemented with relevant antibiotics

steps.title: Incubate the suspension at Room temperature for 00:10:00
steps.instruction: Incubate the suspension at Room temperature for 00:10:00

steps.title: Cold-shock the cells by adding 3...
steps.instruction: Cold-shock the cells by adding 3 mL of ice-cold sterile MQ water per gram of cells (or alternatively, 12 µL of ice-cold water per every OD 600 Unit can be added).

steps.title: Spin down the cells at 8000...
steps.instruction: Spin down the cells at 8000 x g, 4 °C, 20 minutes and collect the supernatant The supernatant contains the periplasmic extraction

steps.title: Move the culture into an incubator...
steps.instruction: Move the culture into an incubator set to 18 °C with 180 RPM of shaking and grow the culture to OD 600 = 0.8 - 1.0

steps.title: Induce the expression by adding IPTG...
steps.instruction: Induce the expression by adding IPTG to a final concentration of 1 millimolar (mM)

steps.title: Let the culture grow at 18...
steps.instruction: Let the culture grow at 18 °C with 180 RPM shaking for 20:00:00 Expression at low temperatures is recommended to enhance the solubility of some proteins.

steps.title: Grow the culture at 37 °C...
steps.instruction: Grow the culture at 37 °C with 250 RPM shaking until an OD 600 = 0.5 - 0.6

steps.title: Spin the culture down at 8000...
steps.instruction: Spin the culture down at 8000 x g, 4 °C, 20 minutes and discard the supernatant Remove as much of the remaining liquid as possible from the centrifuge tube. This helps greatly in periplasmic extraction.

steps.title: Incubate the suspension On ice for 00:10:00
steps.instruction: Incubate the suspension On ice for 00:10:00

steps.title: Keep the extraction On ice when...
steps.instruction: Keep the extraction On ice when working with it and at 4 °C for storage

steps.title: Resuspend the pellet in 3 mL...
steps.instruction: Resuspend the pellet in 3 mL of buffer TSE buffer (200 mM Tris-HCl pH 8, 500mM sucrose, 1mM EDTA) per gram of cells (this normalization can also be based on OD 600 where 12 µL TSE per OD Unit is added) Carefully resuspend the cells in the TSE buffer to avoid breaking the cells. A good tip is to use a sterile inoculation plastic loop to resuspend the pellet in the buffer before using a pipette tip.
